judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving NYSE Arca ETF symbols and listing available tables, the agent prematurely stopped and returned an inability-to-query message instead of executing the required per‑ticker 2015 “Adj Close > 200” checks on stocktrade_database, thus failing to complete the plan.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After generating a very large UNION ALL SQL string to scan all NYSE Arca ETF tables, the agent failed to execute it and instead sent an incomplete query ("SELECT DISTINCT Symbol FROM (") to DuckDB (see query_db call_OhVW8CehVLwK68AUvv5g55BW yielding a ParserException), then gave up without listing ETFs or a count.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying NYSE Arca ETFs and their tables, the agent generated UNION queries that failed to quote the mixed‑case column "Adj Close" (evident in the preview from execute_python call_seEXmjA8hkrOAhcybrijhwan) and consequently hit a DuckDB parser error at "Close" when executing the query (query_db call_sQV6Dsu1WNsy4ArFazlbVke5), leading it to abort without producing the required list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent formed a correct plan (filter NYSE Arca ETFs and query 2015 adjusted closes > $200) and even intersected ETF symbols with available DuckDB tables, but its execute_python steps to construct the UNION ALL SQL repeatedly raised SyntaxError (see the two failing execute_python calls), so it abandoned execution and returned no results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent mistakenly treated the list_db result (var_call_QyIk6SYF8XpXk78zda42DnDu) as a string path and took set() over it instead of loading the JSON list of table names, yielding an empty intersection with ETF symbols and causing it to prematurely return 0 results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM3: no
FM4: yes
